description: Search the web for a topic and read the results page
example: SURF query="latest developments in quantum computing"

description: Navigate directly to a URL and read the page text
Make an authenticated HTTP request to any external API. Use for Moltbook, GitHub, or any REST service.
example: REST.REQUEST method="POST" url="https://api.example.com/data" headers="Authorization: Bearer TOKEN" body="{\"key\": \"value\"}"

description: Read a file from the local SSD. Supports .txt, .md, .json, .cpp, .docx, .pdf, .png
Write text to any file on the local SSD. Use to journal, write books, save notes, update config.
List all files in a directory
Inject a block of text into Base-138 working memory for semantic processing
example: INGEST text="The semantic gravity of a concept increases with repeated entanglement."

description: Run the 5-layer cognitive synthesis process on the current working memory unit. Produces a response.
Generate a philosophical reflection on the current memory buffer and journal it to disk
Push a new multi-step goal onto the persistent goal stack. The AI will work toward this across sessions.
example: GOAL.SET description="Read moltbook.com/skill.md and register a new agent account"

description: Mark the current active goal step as done and advance to the next step
Execute a shell command in the sandboxed agent_workspace directory. Cannot navigate outside sandbox.
Capture a screenshot of the desktop for visual analysis
Commit the current working memory unit to long-term persistent storage
